name: Eggplant Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
1. Add 1 or 2 creole tomatoes if in season.
2. Simmer onion, garlic, tomatoes, ketchup, salt, and pepper for 30 minutes.
3. Add half a cup of oil to a frying pan while the other mixture is simmering.
4. Slice eggplant into 1/2 inch slices (slice only enough to fit into the frying pan).
5. Do not slice ahead of time.
6. Add eggplant to hot oil and fry until slightly browned.
7. Press each slice against the side of the pan to drain oil before removing.
8. Mix Parmesan cheese, parsley, bread crumbs, and oregano in a bowl.
9. Place one layer of eggplant in a flat casserole dish.
10. Sprinkle with bread crumb mixture and cover with tomato mixture.
11. Alternate layers and top with mozzarella cheese.
12. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
